title: A Fine MC
description: Discover the Fine Line: Dive into this Vanilla+ Modpack!
body:
![A Fine MC Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2fd57cb12156d5a127daf5ad2b3043c2ced847f.png)

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)

### Discover the Fine Line: Dive into this Vanilla+ Modpack!

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)


![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a1d6f1b60ef011a9367fc9b4d3726ce31324399.png)

> 🌎 New UI

> 🌎 New Biomes

> 🌎 New Structures (Additional Structures, ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village, and More!)

> 🌎 New Mobs (Naturalist, Adventurez, and More!)

> 🌎 Ride Dragons

> 🌎 New Transportations (Automobility, and More!)

> 🌎 New Armors and Weapons

> 🌎 Better Combat

> 🌎 Better Animations

> 🌎 And More!

> 🌎 300 Mods



![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)



💎 Credits to the Mod Authors on the Mods in this Modpack!
